subcodes.first_line: O loving friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! For thirteen hundred years the star of Persian destiny had set in the West [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان عبدالبهاء هزار و سیصد سال بود که اختر هستی پارسیان در مغرب
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @spiritual transformation
